name: Spinach Pasta Sauce
recipeIngredient: 1/2 cup beef broth or red wine
recipeInstructions:
1. In a Dutch oven, cook and crumble the sausage until browned; drain.
2. Add mushrooms, carrot, green pepper, and onion; sauté for 5 minutes.
3. Add crushed tomatoes, tomato sauce, pasta, Parmesan cheese, beef broth or red wine, aniseed, seasoned salt, garlic powder, brown sugar, and dried oregano to the pot.
4. Cover and simmer for 1 hour.
5. Stir in spinach; heat through until finished cooking.
6. Serve over hot cooked pasta and top with shredded mozzarella cheese and crumbled bacon.
